research_gate: C4 and C5 are verified exact prerequisites. Thirty-eight focused prototype tests and five read-only desktop receipt tests are bounded non-closure evidence. C6 remains incomplete and this gate grants no source, product ontology, physiology constants, runtime, visuals, promotion or Forge-port authority.
authority_lane: Owner-authorized C6 semantic/construction and organism-ecology reconciliation and capability-free readiness only. Exact dependencies verified C4 and C5. Retain corrected C6 prerequisite evidence as non-closure evidence. No C6 implementation source, C3B, C7, broad G1 closure, runtime, product ontology or vocabulary, solver or AI generation, geometry, assets, animation, renderer, visual-quality claim, physiology or content constants, filesystem, network, process, Companion, Greenfield, promotion authority or Kernel mutation.
context_health: C5 is verified, complete and recorded after both registered closure gates. C6 is the sole executing/active cursor for code-free reconciliation only. Current synthetic prototypes expose partial deterministic seams and do not establish organism, anatomy, physiology, ecology, person-form eligibility, runtime or visual truth.

macro_findings: The owner retained the canonical broad route C4 then C5 then C6 then C7 then G1-CLOSEOUT then R1.
C4 and C5 are verified and complete; C6 is the sole active item for code-free reconciliation/readiness. C7, broad G1-CLOSEOUT and R1 remain gated.
The five current C6 prototype seams pass 38 focused tests but prove only generic semantic construction, physical opportunity, hypothetical lineage binding and structural evidence completeness.
Physical opportunity is owned by C3 and is not an ecological niche; representation, geometry, animation and visual quality remain C7-owned.
The smallest prospective implementation is a data-only body-plan structural contract with humanoid and structurally distinct nonhuman fixtures, and remains separately owner-gated.
micro_findings: Focused counts are exact: semantic-construction 14, organism-niche-binding 5, niche-graph-binding 7, macro-lineage-binding 6 and person-form-eligibility 6.
Five C6-specific desktop ProofReceipt bindings pass within a 17-test read-only receipt replay; this is not runtime integration.
The niche-graph result is a C3 physical opportunity precursor, the lineage body-plan reference is opaque, and person-form output is structural completeness only.
Sixty-eight hostile cases cover evidence, ecology, anatomy, physiology, identity, evolution, ecomorphs, capacities, comparative eligibility, applicable variation, aging and end-to-end authority.
Registered run-f51cc195a0f54ad88beeeb5d809780e9 passed the full Forge gate in 801062 ms; C6 source, Forge port, promotion, runtime and visual authority remain withheld.

visual_quality_gate.rationale: C6 readiness is code-free and data-contract-only; geometry, assets, animation, renderer and visual-quality claims remain C7-owned and excluded.

tiers_completed.result: The C4 audit reconciles exact C2+C3A ownership, existing bounded proofs, missing adversarial cases, later-system exclusions and portability classifications.
tiers_completed.evidence: parallel C4 canonical, code and broad-route audits

tiers_completed.result: All 58 core hostile IDs and exact deterministic cost rows pass in capability-free Rust fixtures.
Exact C2+C3A semantic receipt, eight receipt hostiles, two fresh native processes, same-host i686 execution, Android compile and C4V regression pass.
Thirty-six external receipt hostiles and pinned workflow-control assertions fail closed without granting independence.

GitHub-hosted Ubuntu run 29674024317 executed two concurrent native processes at exact C5-successor source 17f39f7 and produced a strictly imported, cryptographically replayable authority-negative receipt; prior receipts are archived intact.
Three independent audits reconciled the exact eight-domain surface, contradicted stale one-gap wording and froze 92 hostile cases plus authority exclusions.
The exact retained C5 source passes 90 Rust tests, strict Clippy, all 92 hostile mappings, ten pressure scenarios and fresh x64/i686/Android-classified semantic replay.
GitHub-hosted Linux run 29678602236 reproduced the exact semantic receipt in two overlapping native processes; strict attestation replay preserves evidence-only authority.

Read-only ProofReceipt integration, exact C4/C5 successor adapters, closure-result hostiles, pre-transition run-87b9301f9bb54b2d9b72767643c7ed9b and post-transition run-8296afcac8e949cca8b6a3693d1dfc3f pass without activating C6.

simulation_ladder.unresolved_risk: A later C6 transition could overread recorded C5 evidence unless the exact owner gate and capability exclusions remain fail-closed.
simulation_ladder.expected_information_gain: No additional C5 execution is required after the post-transition registered gate; the next distinct information gain belongs to a separately authorized C6 readiness audit.
simulation_ladder.estimated_cost: C5 closure replay cost is measured by the registered gate; C6 cost remains unknown until separately authorized.
simulation_ladder.regression_guard: No C3B, C6-C7, broad G1 closure, runtime controller or executor, cache, storage, filesystem, network, process, Companion, Greenfield, visual asset or Kernel mutation.
simulation_ladder.stop_condition: Stop before any C6, runtime, cache, product-weight, promotion or Forge-port mutation without a separate exact owner-authorized transition.
simulation_ladder.final_integration_gate: Post-transition registered measured full gate run-8296afcac8e949cca8b6a3693d1dfc3f passed in 779649 ms against the recorded C5 holding state.

exit_criteria.label: C5 depends exactly on verified C4 and imports no C3B, later-system, storage or runtime authority.
Every named generation, simulation, AI, physics, animation, audio, rendering and streaming obligation is mapped to one shared significance truth.
Deterministic dispatch, admission, budget, fallback, cancellation, fairness, starvation and thrash hostiles are frozen before source.
A separately authorized C5 implementation, focused regressions, independent review and one registered full Forge gate pass without activating C6.

unresolved_risks: A later C6 transition must not reinterpret recorded C5 evidence as runtime, product-policy, promotion, cache or Forge-port authority.
evidence_requirements: retain exact verified C4 as C5's sole dependency
retain the exact eight-domain matrix and superseding one-resource, packet-state, cache-lease and trace-code decisions
retain the minimal additive candidate records and all 92 frozen hostile IDs

verification_plan: retain and replay the exact C5 source snapshot after strict successor classification

reject forged route, crossed evidence tuples, C5 dependency drift, C6 activation and authority overclaim fixtures
replay the hosted Linux attestation and read-only ProofReceipt integration without granting mutation authority

resume_after: Stop at the separately gated first C6 implementation candidate after readiness verification; do not add body-plan or broader C6 source without a new exact authorization.
